title: chianthemum elwesii
intro: Chianthemum elwesii, also known as the Evergreen Chrysanthemum, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The medicinal properties of Chianthemum elwesii lie in its essential oil, which contains sesquiterpenes and flavonoids, exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Chianthemum elwesii can be used to prepare herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly consumed for their medicinal properties.
